case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. GILDA MAIDE ALFARO-DE LEON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT GILDA MAIDE ALFARO DE LEON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALFARO-DE LEON, GILDA MAIDE $1,834.74 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,934.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,834.74 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO-DE LEON, GILDA MAIDE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO-DE LEON, GILDA MAIDE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED APR-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALFARO-DE LEON, GILDA MAIDE
